title: StainCraft
description: The Modpack seen and used by TreestainTV on Youtube.
body:
The heavy hitters for this modpack are for sure:
- Voxy
- Eclipse Shaders (Built from Bliss)
Everything else is either support mods or small mods that affect the game in no way besides visual or ease of access as the goal with this modpack is purely a "vanilla plus" experience.

The System this Modpack was built, tested, and played on is somewhat aged and the specs are:
- Intel I9 9700k
- GTX 1080
- 32GB Ram (using 10GB for minecraft)
I haven't had too many issues with the modpack but if you do have issues I have found different options can kill performance.
